title: cyrtomium pumilum
intro: Cyrtomium pumilum, also known as the dwarf lady fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyrtomium pumilum include its potential in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
